item.title: One simple step for a no-buy plan
item.description: A practical tip from That Practical Mom to help keep a no-buy plan on track with a simple, realistic step.

item.title: Why We Keep Buying Things We Don't Need
item.description: A practical look at why impulse buys happen and simple ways to pause, shop with intention, and keep everyday spending more manageable.

media:content.media:title: Why We Keep Buying Things We Don't Need
media:content.media:description: A practical look at why impulse buys happen and simple ways to pause, shop with intention, and keep everyday spending more manageable.

item.title: How to Break a Shopping Habit
item.description: Simple, realistic steps to reduce impulse shopping without relying on willpower.

media:content.media:title: How to Break a Shopping Habit
media:content.media:description: Simple, realistic steps to reduce impulse shopping without relying on willpower.
